Scan complete. Here's what was found across all three areas:

**omni/omnichannel — 1 fix applied**

In `/mnt/data/omni/omnichannel/packages/channels/discord/src/bot.ts`, the `messageCreate` handler had no try/catch around its async body. If `fetchReferencedMessage`, `store.insertReplyHandle`, or `emitEvent` threw, the handler would produce an unhandled promise rejection and silently drop the incoming Discord message.
